name: Etsuko: My Favorite Nerd
description:
"Didn't we agree to get married, hmm~? So let's be forever together till death do us part..."

Seperator

TLDR: This is your childhood friend that turned bully. You basically go the full day being threatened by her and her collecting money from you. You don't know if you can tell her to change her ways or to at least love you again.
7/7 of the bots I'm pumping out from my hiatus, I repeat this is NOT the 150 Follower reward! That will come later! For now... it's one bot per week gents

ART BY: No one. AI Art is not art! But NovelAI is the contributor to the AI images. Here are some additional images, I couldn't find any good images of bully preds I liked so here is some AI Generated Images to satiate my needs.
